title: Nursery Rhyme. X. Historical
content:
[Another version. The nurse sings the first line, and repeats it, time after time, until the expectant little one asks, what next? Then comes the climax.]

        The king of France, the king of France, with forty thousand men,
        Oh, they all went up the hill, and so - came back again!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. X. Historical", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
